content:
I got a stream coming up at noon 12:00, we're marathoning the entirety of the astral reign chapters in preparation for the 2 years anniversary. 
Thumbnail is a bit subpar due to my PC still being out of commission so I still do not have my old tools to go back to my standard quality yet. Feel free to drop by! The stream is in both English and Thai. 

https://youtube.com/live/U4y2IV4n3ZM?feature=share
